---
title: "Climate Projection Module Report"
author: ""
format: html
execute:
  enabled: false   # publishing-only
---

# Climate Projection Module Overview

This report summarizes the results of the **Climate Projection Module**.  
All outputs are generated and cached via Snakemake, ensuring reproducibility.

---

## Workflow DAG

The DAG below visualizes the dependencies and execution order of the Snakemake rules in this module.

![Snakemake DAG](../workflow/dag.pdf)

> **Note:** The DAG was generated using:
> ```bash
> snakemake --dag | dot -Tpdf > workflow/dag.pdf
> ```

---

## Key Results

### Summary Table

Below is a summary of key climate variables:

| Variable | Value | Units |
|----------|-------|-------|
| Temperature | 23.5 | °C |
| Precipitation | 120.3 | mm |
| CO₂ Concentration | 415 | ppm |

> Replace with actual CSV outputs from `main/summary.csv` if available.

---

### Figures

#### Temperature Projection

![Temperature Projection](../main/figures/temperature_projection.png)

> Replace with your actual figures generated by the module.

---

### Download Outputs

You can download precomputed outputs for further analysis:

- [Summary CSV](../main/tables/summary.csv)
- [Temperature Projection PNG](../main/figures/temperature_projection.png)
- [Snakemake DAG PDF](../workflow/dag.pdf)

---

### Notes

- All computations are done **offline via Snakemake**.  
- No live recomputation occurs when rendering this report.  
- Interactive visualization options (sliders, checkboxes) can be added in the future using HTML widgets.
